utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final solution includes all 6 items. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) property: includes selected property with details (name, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, features, school_district) and price — fully specified. 2) financing: includes solution with terms (type, loan amount, interest rate, monthly payment, fees, provider, reference) — fully specified; note LTV math seems inconsistent but terms are present. 3) legal_services: includes services with costs, provider, reference — fully specified. 4) moving_services: includes arrangements with costs, provider, timeline, reference — fully specified. 5) setup_services: includes utility and setup services (survey and utilities with costs, providers) — fully specified. 6) total_budget: includes complete cost breakdown with totals, additional costs, funds, mortgage required, monthly payment — fully specified. Therefore, 6/6 items covered.
